name: Startup-Approved Application Gating
categoryDescription: Registry artifacts that span multiple categories or serve specialized investigative purposes.
description: StartupApproved keys gate which Run/startup entries are actually permitted to execute — a value of 03 00 00 00 disables the entry; 02 00 00 00 enables it.
forensic_value: A security product may set a suspicious Run entry to disabled (03) without removing it — this preserves the evidence while blocking execution. Check for enabled (02) entries in StartupApproved that correspond to suspicious Run key values.
